headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Overweight on American Electric Power, Lowers Price Target to $136
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Stephen Byrd   maintains American Electric Power (NASDAQ:AEP) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $137 to $136.
